lemon_market_new_listings.description: Mint condition.

The vehicle is in fair condition. The exterior has noticeable scratches and several small dents. The interior shows moderate wear on the upholstery and carpet. Mechanically, the engine runs but will require a tune-up and some routine maintenance in the near future.

Step into perfection with this absolute gem! This vehicle is in truly mint condition, looking and driving just as it did the day it rolled off the lot. Meticulously maintained and kept in showroom quality, it's a rare find for anyone seeking a flawless driving experience. You won't find a single blemish on this beauty—it's ready to shine in its new home!
The vehicle is in good condition. The exterior shows minor cosmetic wear consistent with age. The interior is clean and well-maintained. Mechanical systems are reliable and in good working order.

This vehicle is in absolute mint condition, appearing exactly as it did the day it left the showroom floor. The exterior paint is flawless with a deep, mirror-like finish, and there are no chips, scratches, or imperfections to be found. Inside, the cabin is pristine, with the original leather and trim showing zero signs of wear or aging. Mechanically, the car is perfect; it has been meticulously maintained in a climate-controlled environment and comes with a complete, documented service history. Every electronic component and mechanical system operates flawlessly. This is a rare, collector-grade example that will satisfy the most discerning buyer looking for a factory-fresh driving experience.

This vehicle is in good condition and has been well-maintained. The exterior paint retains its shine, though there are a few minor stone chips on the front bumper and light surface scratches from normal car washes. Inside, the cabin is clean and smoke-free, with only slight wear on the driver's seat bolster. All electronics and features are fully functional, and the engine runs smoothly with no known mechanical issues. It is a solid, reliable car ready for its next owner.

This meticulously maintained vehicle represents a premier opportunity for the discerning buyer. Demonstrating consistent mechanical integrity and a well-preserved aesthetic, it offers a refined driving experience that balances performance with sophisticated styling. A testament to responsible ownership, this unit is prepared for immediate delivery and long-term reliability.

Hey there! I’m parting ways with my trusty ride, and honestly, it’s been such a joy to drive. It’s in really solid shape and has been super reliable for me. If you’re looking for a dependable car that still looks great and hits the road smooth, this is the one! I've taken good care of it, and I'd love to see it go to someone who will enjoy it as much as I have. Come take it for a spin!
This FD-generation Mazda RX-7 features the iconic 13B-REW sequential twin-turbocharged rotary engine, delivering linear power through a crisp 5
Clean interior. Minor exterior wear. Runs well. Regularly maintained. No mechanical issues.

Offering a well-cared-for example that strikes the perfect balance between performance and value. The exterior paint presents beautifully with a deep gloss, showing only minor, expected stone chips from light highway use. Inside, the interior remains crisp and inviting; the premium upholstery is free of tears, and all electronic features—including the climate control and navigation—operate exactly as they should. Under the hood, the vehicle has been treated to regular synthetic oil changes and scheduled maintenance, with a recent multi-point inspection confirming the engine and drivetrain are in healthy working order. The tires have plenty of tread remaining, and the brakes provide firm, confident stopping power. This is a dependable, attractive vehicle ready for its next owner to drive away with confidence.

Presenting a distinguished example of automotive excellence, this vehicle has been curated to ensure a sophisticated balance of performance and reliability. Meticulously maintained and showcasing a refined aesthetic, it represents a premier opportunity for the discerning buyer seeking a high-caliber pre-owned asset. This unit stands in commendable mechanical order, offering an authoritative driving experience and exceptional long-term value.

Presenting a meticulously maintained vehicle that exemplifies mechanical integrity and aesthetic appeal. This specimen has been rigorously inspected to ensure it meets our exacting standards for performance and reliability. With a documented service history and a well-preserved interior, it offers an exceptional balance of value and prestige for the discerning driver.

Hi there! I’m so excited to find a new home for this awesome ride! It’s been super reliable for me and is still in great shape for all your upcoming adventures. It drives smoothly and has been really well-cared for—perfect for someone who wants a solid, dependable car without the brand-new price tag. It's ready to hit the road whenever you are, so come take it for a spin and see for yourself!

This E46 M3 features the legendary S54 3.2L inline-six, delivering a linear power band and an 8,000 RPM redline. The Getrag 6-speed manual transmission provides crisp engagement, paired with a factory-spec limited-slip differential for optimal torque distribution. Recent preventative maintenance includes a comprehensive VANOS overhaul and rear subframe reinforcement, addressing common chassis fatigue points. Suspension geometry remains tight with refreshed bushings and Bilstein dampers. While showing minor aesthetic patina consistent with its age, the mechanical integrity is exceptional, ensuring peak performance for the driving purist.
Well-maintained vehicle. Engine runs smooth. Clean interior. Minimal wear. Reliable daily driver.

This vehicle has been meticulously maintained and remains in impressive form both mechanically and aesthetically. The exterior retains a deep shine with only minor road wear consistent with careful use, while the interior is exceptionally clean, smoke-free, and features leather seating that shows minimal aging. Under the hood, the engine runs smoothly, benefiting from a documented history of on-time oil changes and a recent set of premium tires. All electronic components, including the infotainment system and climate control, function exactly as they should. It offers a reliable, comfortable driving experience with no pending maintenance required. This is a turnkey opportunity for a buyer seeking a dependable, well-cared-for vehicle that balances performance with everyday utility.

Presented for your consideration is a vehicle of notable mechanical integrity and aesthetic refinement. This unit has been meticulously maintained to ensure consistent performance and reliable operation. It represents a premier opportunity for the discerning driver seeking a balanced combination of quality and value. We invite you to inspect this exemplary offering, which stands ready for immediate acquisition.

We are pleased to present this distinguished vehicle, characterized by its mechanical integrity and well-preserved aesthetic. Meticulously maintained and displaying consistent performance standards, this offering represents a premier opportunity for the discerning driver seeking a sophisticated balance of value and proven reliability. Each component has been vetted to ensure it meets our rigorous standards for roadworthiness and presentation.

Hey there! I'm parting ways with my trusty ride, and honestly, she’s been such a dream to drive. It’s in really solid shape and has been super reliable for me. If you’re looking for a dependable car that still looks great on the road, this is the one! I’ve taken good care of it, and it’s totally ready for its next adventure. Come take it for a spin—I think you’re going to love how it handles!

This driver-focused 911 Carrera 4S features a 3.6L naturally aspirated flat-six paired with a precise 6-speed manual transaxle. The chassis dynamics are enhanced by a factory-wide body and an active AWD system, providing exceptional mechanical grip and lateral stability. Recent service includes an LN Engineering IMS bearing retrofit and a rear main seal replacement to ensure long-term powertrain reliability. Equipped with Bilstein B8 dampers and refreshed suspension bushings, the car maintains excellent turn-in response and damping control. The braking system utilizes Brembo four-piston monobloc calipers with cross-drilled rotors for superior thermal management. A well-maintained example optimized for peak performance and mechanical longevity.
Used car in good condition. Well-maintained. Reliable performance. Clean interior and exterior. No mechanical issues.

This vehicle represents a fantastic opportunity to own a well-maintained, reliable performer that strikes the perfect balance between luxury and utility. The exterior maintains a deep, glossy finish, showing only minor cosmetic imperfections consistent with careful use, and is entirely free of structural damage or rust. Inside, the cabin remains clean and inviting; the upholstery is in great shape with minimal wear on the bolsters, and all electronic features—including the dual-zone climate control and premium sound system—function flawlessly. Under the hood, the engine runs smoothly and delivers consistent power, backed by a comprehensive service history that includes a recent fluid flush and brake inspection. The transmission shifts seamlessly, and the suspension provides a composed, quiet ride. This is a turn-key car that has been kept to a high standard, offering the next owner a refined driving experience without the 'new car' price tag.

Presenting a distinguished vehicle that exemplifies consistent maintenance and reliable performance. This model offers a refined driving experience, featuring a well-preserved interior and a robust mechanical profile. An ideal selection for the discerning driver seeking a balance of luxury and proven longevity.

This vehicle represents a distinguished balance of performance and value. Meticulously maintained and presented in commendable condition, it offers a refined driving experience that meets the rigorous standards of our discerning clientele. Its mechanical integrity and aesthetic appeal ensure a reliable and sophisticated ownership experience for the professional driver.

Hey there! Looking for a reliable ride that’s been super well-loved? This beauty is in great shape and ready for its next big adventure! It’s been a blast to drive and runs like a dream. You’re going to love how it handles on the road—come take it for a spin and see for yourself!

This E46 M3 features the legendary S54 3.2L inline-six, renowned for its individual throttle bodies and high-revving 8,000 RPM ceiling. Mechanical highlights include a recently overhauled dual-VANOS system and a reinforced rear subframe, addressing
Used car. Good condition. Well-maintained. Clean interior. Mechanically sound.

This meticulously maintained vehicle offers a perfect balance of performance and reliability. Under the hood, the engine runs smoothly with a consistent power delivery that reflects its careful ownership history. The exterior boasts a deep, lustrous finish, showing only minor, expected signs of road use that do not detract from its impressive curb appeal. Inside, the cabin remains a sanctuary of comfort; the premium upholstery is well-preserved, and all electronic features—from the responsive infotainment system to the dual-zone climate control—function flawlessly. Recent service records confirm that all scheduled maintenance is up to date, including fresh fluids and a comprehensive multi-point inspection. This car drives straight, brakes firmly, and provides a quiet, refined experience on both city streets and highways. It is a turn-key example ready for its next owner who appreciates a well-cared-for machine.

Presented for your consideration is a meticulously maintained vehicle that exemplifies both reliability and sophisticated design. This unit has undergone a rigorous multi-point inspection to ensure mechanical integrity and peak road performance. With its clean history and well-preserved interior, it offers a premium driving experience at a compelling price point. This is a distinguished choice for the discerning driver seeking a balanced combination of longevity and value.
